es-MX.title: Mira TV
es-MX.subtitle: Tu reproductor IPTV personal
es-MX.description:
Mira TV es un reproductor para tu proveedor de IPTV compatible con Xtream Codes. Conecta tu cuenta e introduce tus propias credenciales para acceder a tu catálogo: canales en vivo, películas y series.

Mira TV no incluye ni distribuye contenido: solo reproduce el catálogo de la cuenta que tú configures. Necesitas una suscripción activa con un proveedor de IPTV propio.

Características:
• Canales en vivo, películas y series desde tu cuenta Xtream
• Continuar viendo y favoritos
• Selector de audio y subtítulos
• Búsqueda y filtrado por categorías
• Tus credenciales se guardan cifradas en el dispositivo

en-US.title: Mira TV
en-US.subtitle: Your personal IPTV player
en-US.description:
Mira TV is a player for your own Xtream Codes compatible IPTV provider. Connect your account with your own credentials to access your catalog: live channels, movies and series.

Mira TV does not include or distribute any content: it only plays the catalog of the account you configure. An active subscription with your own IPTV provider is required.

Features:
• Live channels, movies and series from your Xtream account
• Continue watching and favorites
• Audio and subtitle track selection
• Search and category filtering
• Your credentials are stored encrypted on the device

review.notes:
Mira TV is a generic IPTV client, comparable to VLC or Infuse. It does not include, host, distribute, or provide any streaming content. The app connects exclusively to Xtream Codes-compatible servers configured by the end user using their own credentials from their own IPTV subscription. The app has no backend infrastructure and no built-in content catalog.

To review all features without a personal IPTV subscription, please use the built-in DEMO MODE:
1. On the setup screen, scroll down past the login form.
2. Tap 'Explore in demo mode' (below the 'or' divider).
3. The app loads a sample catalog with live channels, movies, and series so all screens and navigation can be reviewed.

Note: In demo mode, playback will show a connection error because there is no real server — all other features (catalog browsing, search, favorites, settings, theme, language) are fully functional.
